ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., CCG, NHS trust) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the entity */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the entity */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expense type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the expense type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the expense type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_areas" (
  "expense_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense area */,
  "expense_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense area */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expense area is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the expense area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the expense area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "vat_registration_number" TEXT /* VAT registration number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the supplier is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "purchase_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity creating the purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the purchase order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was created */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the purchase order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the purchase order */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the purchase order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the purchase order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "purchase_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order associated with the invoice */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was received */,
  "invoice_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "vat_amount" REAL /* VAT amount for the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the invoice */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the invoice was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_purchase_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("purchase_order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("purchase_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_numbers" (
  "transaction_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction number */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment associated with the transaction number */,
  "transaction_number" INTEGER /* Transaction number for the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the transaction number was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the transaction number was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_numbers_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ap_amounts" (
  "ap_amount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AP amount */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invoice associated with the AP amount */,
  "ap_amount" REAL /* AP amount for the invoice */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the AP amount has been paid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the AP amount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the AP amount was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ap_amount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ap_amounts_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vat_registration_numbers" (
  "vat_registration_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VAT registration number */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier associated with the VAT registration number */,
  "vat_registration_number" TEXT /* VAT registration number for the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the VAT registration number was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the VAT registration number was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vat_registration_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vat_registration_numbers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)
